hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input&&i.tool_input.command||'';const isD=/rm\s+-rf|docker\s+volume\s+(prune|rm)|docker\s+system\s+prune|docker[- ]compose\s+down\s+-v|rsync\s+--delete|dd\s+if=|mkfs/.test(cmd);const isC=/docker-compose|docker\s+compose/.test(cmd);const isV=/wireguard|wg-quick|openvpn|vpn\.conf|vpn\.sh/i.test(cmd);if(isD){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',additionalContext:'\u26a0\ufe0f Commande destructive d\u00e9tect\u00e9e \u2014 invoquer arr-destructive-gate avant ex\u00e9cution'}}));}else if(isC){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',additionalContext:'\u2699\ufe0f Commande docker-compose \u2014 invoquer arr-docker-validator + arr-compose-builder'}}));}else if(isV){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',additionalContext:'\ud83d\udd12 Commande VPN \u2014 invoquer arr-vpn-checker'}}));}}catch(e){}});" 2>>~/.claude/hooks-arrstack.log || true
